targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, uniq(mac) AS clients FROM netmon.unifi_clients WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY timestamp ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT if(is_wired = 1, 'Wired', 'WiFi') AS type, uniq(mac) AS count FROM netmon.unifi_clients WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE GROUP BY is_wired
SELECT avg(experience) AS score FROM netmon.unifi_clients WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE AND is_wired = 0 AND experience > 0

SELECT timestamp AS time, avg(signal) AS avg_signal, min(signal) AS min_signal, max(signal) AS max_signal FROM netmon.unifi_clients WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND is_wired = 0 AND signal < 0 GROUP BY timestamp ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT name, hostname, ip, mac, avg(signal) AS avg_signal, min(signal) AS worst_signal, any(ap_mac) AS connected_ap, count() AS samples FROM netmon.unifi_clients WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND is_wired = 0 AND signal < -75 GROUP BY name, hostname, ip, mac ORDER BY avg_signal ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT name, hostname, ip, mac, network, if(is_wired = 1, 'Wired', 'WiFi') AS connection, signal, channel, experience, formatReadableSize(tx_bytes) AS tx, formatReadableSize(rx_bytes) AS rx, formatReadableTimeDelta(uptime) AS uptime FROM netmon.unifi_clients WHERE timestamp = (SELECT max(timestamp) FROM netmon.unifi_clients) ORDER BY name, hostname

SELECT name, model, type, ip, version, if(state = 1, 'Online', 'Offline') AS status, round(cpu_usage, 1) AS cpu_pct, round(mem_usage, 1) AS mem_pct, num_clients, formatReadableSize(tx_bytes) AS tx, formatReadableSize(rx_bytes) AS rx, formatReadableTimeDelta(uptime) AS uptime FROM netmon.unifi_devices WHERE timestamp = (SELECT max(timestamp) FROM netmon.unifi_devices) ORDER BY type, name
